{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Underlady
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|An [[Akura Underlady]] leads [[Lindon]] to a guest room.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
